productDisplayName: Converse Unisex Grey CT Oxford Ox Casual Shoes
description: Dedicated to Basketball champ Chuck Taylor, this Chuck Taylor All-Star series from converse are also called Chucks and comes in classic designs. Created using canvas and rubber, this range of sneakers from Converse were initially designed to capture the basketball market, but soon enough turned into hot casual footwear favourites.UpperCanvas upper for easy maintenance and durabilityCarbon rubber toe box for enhanced protection of the upper footLong canvas tongue for added comfort and snug FitSynthetic twill lace running through metallic eyelets for durability and snug fitMidsoleCushioned fabric footbed for comfort and breathable comfortComfort insole for all-day easy wearOutsoleReinforced guard to protect the forefoot of the shoe and enhance durabilityVulcanized rubber outsole for flexibility and tractionWaffle pattern outsole for superior grip on all terrainsShoe careMake a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot waterRub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brushWash off with lukewarm water
